{{CargoRelic
|name=Newcomen Engine
|class_id=22485
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=07-10
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.25%)
|description=On Jul 10, 1705 AD, Newcomen developed a new type of machine for mine drainage.<br>To help his partner solve the problem of mine drainage, Newcomen modified the old steam pump, separating the cylinder from the boiler to increase thermal efficiency, and using a piston device to enhance the conversion of firepower into mechanical force. This new type of pneumatic steam engine was quickly promoted and, decades later, became a reference prototype for Watt's improved steam engine.
|fame=26
|art=24
|fth=33
|civ=25
|tech=46
|ss1=Species War Cabin, deployable robots +1
|ss2=Species War Cabin, deployable robots +2
|ss3=Species War Cabin, deployable robots +3
|ss4=Species War Cabin, deployable robots +5
|ss7=Species War Cabin, deployable robots +5<br>Species War Cabin, deployable robots +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill I.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, 2x Purple Card Drops +2.5%
}}
